narrative:
Precinct Clay-Martinsburg (precinct in Knox County) has 885 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.5 percentage points.
